transcription.text: You know, there's no trick to this new Sunday breakfast treat. New Pillsbury Quick Caramel Nut Rolls. Mmm, look at that luscious caramel and chopped nut topping, huh? You know, your family will think you spent all day in the kitchen, but Pillsbury Quick Caramel Nut Rolls are the easy-to-fix sweet rolls with the hard-to-make look, because Pillsbury does all the hard work. Packs this luscious caramel and chopped nut topping in each can. Now you just crumble it over the bottom of a cake pan, and moisten with a tablespoon of water, just like that. And next come the eight rolls of fresh dough. Just place them in the pan on the topping. And then all you do is bake them and love them. There's nothing like that topping, rich with choice nut meats and luscious caramel. So this weekend, turn your Sunday breakfast into something special with new Pillsbury Quick Caramel Nut Rolls. Put them on your weekend shopping list. You'll find them at your grocer's dairy case, along with Pillsbury Quick, cinnamon rolls, and Pillsbury Buttermilk Biscuits. Two other easy ways to please your family.
